title: Zoro’s Promise Is Revealed
description: On pages 8–11, this part resolves the Shells Town conflict and separates Coby’s Marine dream from Luffy and Zoro’s pirate path.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WE'RE GOING OUR SEPARATE WAYS, BUT WE'LL ALWAYS BE FRIENDS!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I know all about his fast...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: See, there was this secret island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: If they find out about your background, they won't let you enlist...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AND FOR TWO YEARS, THIS GUY...

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
